business.headline: Decoding the AI threat to banks that Nirmala Sitharaman warned aboutFinance Minister Nirmala Sitharaman met bank chiefs to discuss rising AI-linked risks in the financial system. To understand how serious the threat could become, we dug deeper into the risks banks face from AI and spoke to experts across the cybersecurity and technology sectors.

RBI cancels Paytm Payments Bank licence: What it means for Paytm usersThe RBI has cancelled Paytm Payments Bank's licence after years of restrictions and scrutiny. The big question now is how this move could affect everyday Paytm users.

The many ways motor insurance is mis-sold in IndiaMotor insurance mis-selling in India is not an exception, it is part of how the system works. What customers don't know at the time of purchase often costs them the most at the time of claim.

Reliance Q4 profit slips to Rs 16,971 crore; Rs 6 dividend announcedReliance Industries posted consolidated net profit attributable to owners of Rs 16,971 crore for the quarter ended March 31, 2026, down from Rs 19,407 crore a year earlier.

RBI cancels Paytm Payments Bank licence; to seek winding up in courtThe action marks a dramatic escalation in regulatory steps against Paytm Payments Bank, which had already faced severe business restrictions over the past two years.

Is not using your credit card doing more harm than good?For many people, the safest way to avoid debt is simple, i.e., stop using credit cards altogether. No swipes, no bills, no worries. But could this seemingly smart move actually be harming your credit score?

How this 25-year old built a Rs 20 lakh portfolio in almost 3 yearsBuilding a Rs 20 lakh portfolio usually feels like a long-term goal. But a 25-year-old techie managed to do it in just about three years. The surprising part? His salary wasn't very high, so what did he do differently?
Sensex ends 982 points lower, Nifty below 24,000; IT stocks tankSensex ends 982 points lower, Nifty below 24,000; IT stocks tank

Bernstein flags job risk, subsidy burden in open letter to PM ModiThe letter, which revisits themes first raised in 2019, comes at a time when India has moved up global GDP rankings but continues to face challenges in employment, innovation and infrastructure.

Should you pause your SIP when markets fall? Here's the truth most investors missThe moment markets dip, doubt creeps in. That steady SIP (Systematic Investment Plan) you trusted now feels risky. Should you stop and play safe for a while? The answer isn't as obvious as it seems.

Infosys grants Rs 51.75 crore ESOPs to CEO, employees still await pay hikeThe ESOP approval comes after a strong quarterly performance by the company. Infosys reported a 20.9% rise in net profit to Rs 8,501 crore in the March quarter, while revenue grew 13.4%.

Explained: How Rs 5 lakh PF withdrawal after 3 years could cost you Rs 1.5 lakhWithdrawing your PF after switching jobs may seem like an easy financial move. But what many don't realise is that an early withdrawal can come with a surprisingly high tax cost, cutting a big chunk from your savings.
Why HCLTech shares are under pressure againThe fresh decline comes just days after the company's latest quarterly results disappointed the Street and triggered a sharp sell-off in the stock.

Received money, mutual funds or shares as gifts? Don't miss these ITR rulesGifts in the form of money or investments are quite common, but they come with tax rules that are often overlooked. Knowing what to declare in your ITR can save you from unnecessary notices later.

8th Pay Commission: Key meetings to begin in Delhi from April 28, more rounds plannedIn a notice dated April 24, 2026, the Commission said it has received a large number of requests from employee unions and associations for meetings scheduled between April 28 and April 30 in Delhi.

Infosys share price crashes after Q4 results: Why stock fell 6% todayThe IT giant's share price declined 6% intraday, making it one of the biggest losers in the technology pack, as investors reacted more to future guidance than to the quarterly profit itself.

AI security risk for banks? Why has Nirmala Sitharaman raised concernsAt the centre of the issue is Anthropic's new AI model, known as Claude Mythos Preview, capable of identifying and exploiting vulnerabilities across major operating systems and web browsers when prompted.

Infosys shares down 5%, hit 52-week low: Why IT stock tumbled after Q4 resultsAt around 11:01 am, Infosys shares were trading at Rs 1,178.20 on the NSE, down 5.03% or Rs 62.40 for the day. The fall made it one of the worst performers on benchmark indices as the IT pack remained under pressure.

Will petrol, diesel prices rise after elections? Here's what we knowThe government has dismissed rumours of a petrol and diesel price hike, but elevated crude prices and pressure on oil retailers have kept the debate firmly alive.

HCLTech, TCS, Infosys: Why are IT stocks falling again?HCLTech led losses as frontline IT stocks fell up nearly 5% amid renewed worries over global demand, weak guidance and continued foreign investor selling pressure.

entertainment.headline: Rashmika, Vijay cheer for fan's viral Vachindamma reel: Timing is epic Rashmika Mandanna and Vijay Deverakonda reacted to an influencer's recreation of the song, Vachindamma from Geetha Govindam. The duo praised the talent and timing of the young fan.

Unchosen review: Atmospheric cult drama led by strong performances and slow pacingRelease Date:Tue Apr 21, 2026 Director Jim Loach and creator Julie Gearey deliver Unchosen, a haunting look at faith and control. Despite a slow pace, Molly Windsor's quiet rebellion makes this psychological thriller series deeply immersive.

Rihanna asks how to say thank you in Hindi; wins hearts with shukriya in Mumbai Rihanna launched her cosmetic brand in Mumbai and later thanked fans in Hindi. Her fun interaction, saying Shukriya quickly went viral online.

Rihanna's viral Mumbai moment: Singer invites pap for a photo-op in fun video Barbadian singer and businesswoman Rihanna invited a photographer to join her on the red carpet at a Mumbai event. The moment went viral, with fans praising her warm exchange with the paparazzi.

Raaka, Pushpa, AA23: Why Allu Arjun is Tollywood's superstar shape-shifter After the Pushpa films, Allu Arjun continues ditching the playbook with Atlee's Raaka. He steps into a bold, unrecognisable avatar again. In this week's Cinematic Saturday, we decode how it's a sharp pivot – less comfort, more risk – and a clear sign he's rewriting his superstardom.

Ahaan Panday on why he took Aneet Padda to places of worship before Saiyaara release Ahaan Panday said he took Aneet Padda to places of worship before Saiyaara was released in theatres. He said that the visits were not meant to pray for a hit.

Rob, Michele Reiner's son Jake reflects on parents' deaths: A living nightmare Actor Jake Reiner opened up about the shock and grief of losing his parents, filmmaker Rob Reiner and his wife Michele Singer. He reflected on coping with the tragedy and asked for compassion as his brother Nick faces murder charges.

Sanjay Dutt announces Khalnayak Returns, Maanayata can't control her tears Maanayata Dutt fought tears as her husband Sanjay Dutt unveiled Khalnayak Returns in Mumbai on Friday. She recalled the highs and lows the actor had to go through to realise the project.

Ssunita Ahuja, Krushna-Kashmera reunion on Laughter Chefs 3 ends 14-year feud. Watch Govinda's wife, Ssunita Ahuja, will be seen with Krushna Abhishek and Kashmera Shah on Laughter Chefs 3 after years of feud. The emotional moment saw apologies, forgiveness, and differing takes on what the meeting meant.

Viral: Priyanka Chopra, Mahesh Babu's pic with Varanasi choreographer Bosco Martis Priyanka Chopra and Mahesh Babu's pictures with choreographer Bosco Martis from Varansi sets have emerged online. Reportedly, the duo has completed a dance sequence in Hyderabad.

Ahaan Panday talks of a possible collaboration with Aryan Khan Actor Ahaan Panday said he is open to working with director Aryan Khan in the future. However, he had a special condition that harks back to their childhood bond.

Jana Nayagan leak: Film editor suspended by South editor body over bylaw violations The South Indian Film Editors Association has suspended Jana Nayagan editor Pradeep E Raghav over alleged bylaw violations and negligence linked to the film. The body said the lapse, including his admitted contribution to the film's online leak, raised wider concerns.

Is Veronica back? Deepika Padukone's Cocktail 2 cameo rumours are trending A Reddit post has claimed actor Deepika Padukone may return as Veronica in Cocktail 2, sparking fresh buzz around the sequel. There is no official confirmation yet but the film has already garnered attention for its cast, music and vibe.

No China, no Gulf, Dhurandhar 2's box office supremacy still unabated after 5 weeks Dhurandhar: The Revenge has completed 36 days in theatres and is closing in on Baahubali 2's global total. Its run stands out because it has crossed Rs 1,766 crore without releases in China or the Gulf markets.

Row at Darling re-release show: Fan beaten with slippers, sticks. Viral videos The re-release of Prabhas' Darlings sparked a row after a man was beaten with sticks and slippers at a Hyderabad theatre. Several videos from the altercations have emerged online.

Prabhas' Darling records 2nd biggest Telugu re-release debut, earns Rs 7.59 crore Prabhas and Kajal Aggarwal's Darling has returned to theatres with its 4K re-release, with a smashing opening globally. The film now stands as the second-biggest Telugu re-release opener after Baahubali: The Epic.

Billie Eilish relives Justin Bieber fangirl days after surprise Coachella cameo At Coachella 2026, Billie Eilish shared the stage with Justin Bieber, fulfilling a long-held dream that dates back to her teenage years. She later posted nostalgic photos on Instagram, celebrating her journey as a devoted fan and the emotional milestone of performing alongside her idol.

Kunal Kapoor to make cameo in Ek Din, says Aamir's call was reason enough Actor Kunal Kapoor is set to make a guest appearance in Ek Din after his Rang De Basanti co-star Aamir Khan personally asked him to join the film. He described the romantic drama as warm and said he believes it will connect with audiences.

Priyanka Chopra makes history, to receive Global Vanguard Honor for 25-year legacy Priyanka Chopra will receive the inaugural Global Vanguard Honor for her unprecedented 25-year career across industries and continents. The ceremony will take place on May 9.

general news.headline: Kejriwal is Rehman Dacoit of Delhi: BJP outs 'Sheesh Mahal 2' pics; AAP says fakeBJP leader Parvesh Verma accused AAP chief Arvind Kejriwal of living in luxury and alleged he had built a second 'Sheesh Mahal' at his new residence in Lodhi Estate. AAP MP Sanjay Singh dismissed the images as "fake" and warned of defamation action.

China's nail house resistance seen at Delhi-Dehradun expresswayIn China, authorities have built highways around "nail houses" after landowners refused to sell them. A similar case is now visible in India, where a house in Ghaziabad is blocking a key exit ramp on the Delhi–Dehradun Expressway.

Gen Z effect? Raghav Chadha loses 1 million followers after BJP switchThe shock exit of Raghav Chadha from the AAP to join the BJP doesn't seem to have impressed Gen Z. The suave Rajya Sabha MP, who enjoyed considerable popularity among the youth, lost one million followers in under 24 hours.

Maine kaand kar diya: Killer called cousin after murdering IRS officer's daughterInvestigators say the accused called his cousin after the Delhi killing and said he had committed a crime. The call, along with betting debt leads, movement tracking and recoveries, has widened the probe's focus.

US to Canada: Why Pokemon cards are catching attention of criminalsPokemon cards, once collected and traded in schools, are drawing the attention of criminals. Smash-and-grab robberies have been reported across several countries. It comes amid a resurgence in craze for rare Pokemon cards.

Iran resumes commercial flights from Tehran airport for first time since war Live UpdatesIran resumed flights from Tehran after a two-month halt under a fragile US-backed ceasefire, while diplomatic efforts intensify in Pakistan to sustain talks.

Bharatiya Jhootha Party: AAP hits back at BJP over 'Sheesh Mahal 2' claimsThe BJP had earlier alleged that Arvind Kejriwal was living in luxury, displaying visuals claiming to be from his new Delhi residence in Lodhi Estate, a charge AAP leaders have strongly denied.

Why Sandeep Pathak's shocking exit is bigger setback for AAPTwo-thirds of AAP's Rajya Sabha MPs merged with the BJP, but Sandeep Pathak's defection shocked the party given his role as Arvind Kejriwal's key strategist and staunch BJP critic.

Thin doesn't mean healthy: Riddhima Kapoor busts a common mythRiddhima Kapoor Sahni highlights persistent fatigue as a key symptom you should never ignore, stressing that it may signal deeper health issues. She also shares her approach to sleep, stress, fitness, and building sustainable wellness habits.

Ex-Muslim YouTuber Saleem Wastik arrested in murder case after stabbing attackThe case involves the abduction and murder of 13-year-old Sandeep Bansal, the son of a Delhi-based businessman. On January 20, 1995, the boy was kidnapped while on his way to school.

Gurugram man takes sex-enhancing drugs before meeting fiancée, dies of overdoseA 29-year-old man in Gurugram was found dead in his PG room, with police suspecting a fatal overdose of a sex-enhancing drug before meeting his fiancée.

No Iran-US talks planned: Tehran says engagement via Pak as delegation arrivesIran's foreign minister Abbas Araghchi arrived in Islamabad with a delegation as Pakistan mediates renewed US-Iran talks, with US envoys also heading there to restart stalled negotiations.

Captains from best to worst: An IPL 2026 mid-season reportShreyas Iyer has emerged as the standout captain so far, while Hardik Pandya sits at the bottom of the rankings. The mid-season assessment also tracks strong starts from Rajat Patidar and Ishan Kishan, and growing pressure on several others.

Rihanna's viral Mumbai moment: Singer invites pap for a photo-op in fun videoBarbadian singer and businesswoman Rihanna invited a photographer to join her on the red carpet at a Mumbai event. The moment went viral, with fans praising her warm exchange with the paparazzi.

India's sitar gets its soul from Iran, but its tune comes from physicsThe sitar's distinctive sound is produced by a gently curved surface that makes each note bloom before it settles, an effect Indian craftspeople perfected by ear centuries before scientists could explain it.

Skyroot inches closer to India's first private Vikram-I rocket launchTelangana Chief Minister A. Revanth Reddy visited Skyroot's Max-Q Campus in Hyderabad to ceremonially flag off the Vikram-1 launch vehicle as it begins its journey to the Satish Dhawan Space Centre.

Raaka, Pushpa, AA23: Why Allu Arjun is Tollywood's superstar shape-shifterAfter the Pushpa films, Allu Arjun continues ditching the playbook with Atlee's Raaka. He steps into a bold, unrecognisable avatar again. In this week's Cinematic Saturday, we decode how it's a sharp pivot – less comfort, more risk – and a clear sign he's rewriting his superstardom.
Question Time: Weekly News QuizThink you read the headlines this week? Let's test that!

India's missing women workforce: Why millions are absent from jobs and dataHandcrafted ByOur Editors India's employment numbers look stronger, but millions of women remain outside the workforce or trapped in low-paying jobs. New data shows many are not counted as unemployed at all, exposing a hidden labour crisis shaped by care burdens, weak job quality, and limited opportunities for educated women nationwide.

Beyond the spotlight: PM Modi's recurring moments behind the cameraA closer look at Prime Minister Narendra Modi's lesser-seen moments behind the camera, capturing wildlife, cityscapes, and candid scenes during official visits.

South Korea becomes hot new study abroad pick as Indian students rethink US, UKSouth Korea is fast emerging as a new study abroad destination for Indian students, offering lower fees, strong STEM courses, job-linked education and a new one-stop government portal for admissions, scholarships and visas. As costs rise in traditional countries, more students are taking notice of the comparatively lower costs of studying in South Korea.

Colgate, coolgate: BRS takes veiled dig at K Kavitha after her party launchThe BRS took a veiled swipe at former MP K Kavitha after she launched the Telangana Rashtra Sena. Its message on X signalled the strain following her suspension from the party.

Six volunteers locked in 100-day isolation to prepare humans for deep spaceThe participants entered a sealed habitat at the Envihab facility, where they will live and work in conditions designed to simulate the confinement, autonomy and psychological pressures of missions beyond low Earth orbit.

How killer of IRS officer's daughter used deceit to rape friend's wife in AlwarFocus has shifted to Alwar, where Rahul Meena allegedly used deception and familiarity to target a neighbour's wife hours before the Delhi crime. The survivor's husband said he learnt of the incident after his wife called him, saying Rahul had come and "did something wrong," breaking down during the call.

sports.headline: This is the new Devdutt Padikkal: RCB star embraces his new fiery version IPL 2026: Devdutt Padikkal has redefined his T20 game in IPL 2026, trading caution for controlled aggression. The new approach is not just eye-catching, it is delivering real impact for RCB.

Kohli, Siraj reunited: Fans loving heartwarming moment after RCB vs GT IPL 2026: A brief reunion between Virat Kohli and Mohammed Siraj became the standout moment after RCB's win over GT. The viral hug captured the bond between former teammates, striking a chord with fans in Bengaluru.

Kylian Mbappe faces World Cup scare after injury blow in Real Madrid's draw vs Betis Kylian Mbappe went off with left hamstring discomfort during Real Madrid's 1-1 draw with Real Betis. The setback adds to Madrid's injury problems and raises fresh concern before France's World Cup opener.

Root better to watch than Virat Kohli? Ex-England captain sparks social media war IPL 2026: Michael Vaughan said Joe Root is better to watch than Virat Kohli after Sam Billings praised Kohli's latest RCB knock. The remark set off a social media debate as Kohli's franchise form and Root's red-ball class were weighed against each other.

With Pat Cummins boost, SRH set sights on extending impressive run vs RR IPL 2026, RR vs SRH: Sunrisers Hyderabad head to Jaipur seeking another win against Rajasthan Royals with Pat Cummins back in contention. The contest puts Rajasthan's top-order reliance under focus as both sides chase a stronger top-four position.

Captains from best to worst: An IPL 2026 mid-season report Shreyas Iyer has emerged as the standout captain so far, while Hardik Pandya sits at the bottom of the rankings. The mid-season assessment also tracks strong starts from Rajat Patidar and Ishan Kishan, and growing pressure on several others.

Sinner urges Alcaraz not to rush after French Open miss due to injury Jannik Sinner urged Carlos Alcaraz not to rush back after the Spaniard withdrew from Roland Garros with a wrist injury. The defending champion's absence opens up the Paris draw and shifts attention to whether he can return for Wimbledon.

The Man in the Mirror: How Virat Kohli's Ziddi spirit is outrunning time in IPL IPL 2026, RCB vs GT: Virat Kohli smashed a 44-ball 81 in Bengaluru's successful chase of 206 against Gujarat Titans on Friday. Gujarat Titans' assistant coach Vijay Dahiya spoke about the 'Ziddi spirit' that is helping Kohli stay ahead of the curve in this new-era of T20 cricket.

IPL Play of the Day: RCB's triple-threat choke that clamped GT in final stretch RCB vs GT, IPL Play of the Day: RCB flipped the script at the death, conceding just 17 runs in three overs as Hazlewood, Bhuvneshwar and Suyash choked the flow to keep the target firmly within reach.

Sreesanth says Harbhajan made Rs 1 crore from IPL slapgate ad, blocks him on Insta Sreesanth says Harbhajan Singh revived the 2008 slapgate by profiting from a television advertisement. The charge has reopened an old IPL wound and hardened Sreesanth's claim that reconciliation was merely performative.

Struggling DC face stern test against unbeaten PBKS in clash of contrasts IPL 2026, DC vs PBKS: Delhi Capitals need something close to their best to pull their campaign back on track when they take on a rampaging Punjab Kings in the IPL on Saturday. Delhi face a tough challenge against a Punjab side that has looked sharp and in control right through the season.

Why should pacers have all the fun? Krunal Pandya on his wily variationsKrunal Pandya has redefined his role in IPL 2026, using innovation and mindset to counter modern batting and emerge as a key bowling force for RCB in a format dominated by hitters.

Selfless Virat Kohli praises Devdutt Padikkal as real hero of RCB's win over GTIPL 2026, RCB vs GT: Virat Kohli praised Devdutt Padikkal for his 20-ball half-century, saying it was the left-hander who made the difference in RCB's five-wicket win over GT on Friday in Bengaluru.

PV Sindhu triumphs, but India suffer 2-3 defeat against DenmarkPV Sindhu gave India a strong start with a win over Denmark, but the team eventually slipped to a 2-3 defeat in their Uber Cup Group A opener. India will look to bounce back when they face Ukraine on April 25.

Virat Kohli rides luck to make GT pay as RCB sign off from Chinnaswamy in styleIPL 2026, RCB vs GT: Virat Kohli was dropped on a duck, and he went on to make Gujarat Titans pay with an 81-run knock as the Royal Challengers Bengaluru won by five wickets on Sunday to end their Chinnaswamy leg on a high.

Virat Kohli, Shubman Gill share cheeky banter on sidelines of RCB vs GT: WatchRCB vs GT: Virat Kohli and Shubman Gill shared a light moment during RCB vs GT as Sai Sudharsan's 58-ball 100 powered Gujarat Titans to 205, setting up a strong contest.

Carlos Alcaraz pulls out of French Open after failing to recover from wrist injuryFrench Open: World No.2 Carlos Alcaraz won't defend his Roland Garros title after failing to recover from wrist injury. Last year, Alcaraz won the title after beating Jannik Sinner in a thrilling final at Philippe-Chatrier.

Sai Sudharsan effortlessly storms back into form with sensational hundred vs RCBSai Sudharsan eased his way back into form with a fluent 57-ball hundred, his third in the IPL, anchoring Gujarat Titans' charge against RCB with a knock marked by control, timing and authority.

Benfica's Gianluca Prestianni gets six-match ban for abusing Vinicius JuniorUEFA banned Benfica's Gianluca Prestianni for six matches for discriminatory abuse of Vinicius Junior during a Champions League clash.

Deepti Sharma's form a concern, but India keep faith in her before T20 World CupSAW vs INDW, 4th T20I: Head coach Amol Muzumdar admitted that Deepti Sharma's dip in form is a concern, but backed her to bounce back. She has gone wicketless in her last five T20Is and has an economy rate of 10.73 on the tour of South Africa.

India submit Expression of Interest to host 2038 Asian GamesIndia has submitted its EOI to host the 2038 Asian Games, with Ahmedabad emerging as a key contender, as the country pushes to host multiple global sporting events including the 2036 Olympics.

Jacob Bethell finally gets a game for RCB after Cook vs Pietersen IPL debateIPL 2026, RCB vs GT: Jacob Bethell replaced Phil Salt as Royal Challengers Bengaluru made just one change for their clash against Gujarat Titans on Friday. His inclusion comes amid a fiery debate between Kevin Pietersen and Alastair Cook over his role in the IPL.

India must nurture Sooryavanshi if he is to play Test cricket: Harbhajan SinghFormer India spinner Harbhajan Singh said India will need to handle teenage sensation Vaibhav Sooryavanshi with patience and proper planning, emphasising that he must be carefully nurtured to become a Test cricketer.

Pat Cummins confirms availability for Rajasthan Royals clash: Been a long time comingIPL 2026, RR vs SRH: Pat Cummins confirmed his availability for Sunrisers Hyderabad's clash against Rajasthan Royals after recovering from a long-term back injury, boosting the side after missing the first seven matches.

RCB vs GT Highlights: Royal Challengers Bengaluru win by 5 wicketsBengaluru (RCB) vs Gujarat (GT) Highlights, IPL 2026: Krunal Pandya gives RCB the finishing touch as the Royal Challengers Bengaluru sign off their league-stage fixtures at the Chinnaswamy with a five-wicket win.

Thomas Cup: Lakshya loses, but Ayush Shetty inspires India to 4-1 win vs CanadaIndia secured a commanding 4-1 lead over Canada in their opening Thomas Cup tie, powered by wins from Ayush Shetty and both doubles pairs, including Satwiksairaj Rankireddy and Chirag Shetty. After Lakshya Sen's early loss, India bounced back strongly with dominant performances to seal the tie.

Does he have a passport? Cook's cheeky take on Sooryavanshi's India selectionFormer England captain Alastair Cook took a cheeky dig at the debate around Vaibhav Sooryavanshi's India selection, jokingly questioning whether the 15-year-old Rajasthan Royals opener even had a passport.

Struggling Suryakumar Yadav told not to be predictable by Wasim JafferIPL 2026: Wasim Jaffer believes Suryakumar Yadav has become too predictable in his shot selection, with opposition teams exploiting his strengths and restricting his scoring options, leading to a lack of consistency in the IPL. His struggles continued in Mumbai Indians' heavy loss to Chennai Super Kings, where despite a brief partnership with Tilak Varma, he failed to anchor the chase.

Vinod Kambli celebrates Sachin Tendulkar's birthday with kids at Shivaji ParkFormer India cricketer Vinod Kambli marked his childhood friend Sachin Tendulkar's birthday with a heartfelt gesture at Shivaji Park, where their cricketing journeys first took shape, as he shared ice cream with young aspiring cricketers.

Video: Akash Ambani walks out of Wankhede Stadium midway through MI's lossMumbai Indians owner Akash Ambani walked out of the Wankhede Stadium midway through MI's heavy defeat to Chennai Super Kings, a moment that reflected the growing frustration within the camp during IPL 2026.

education.headline: The role of data analytics in modern advertising educationThis transformation also exercises a significant impact on the realm of 'advertising education.'

NCERT deletes Azad Pak, adds China's aggression reference in Class 12 textbookThe NCERT has made final changes to its Class 12 Political Science textbook syllabus for the upcoming academic year, including a revision in reference to India's border situation with China, Azad Pakistan, Article 370 and more.

NEET row: Bihar cops find 6 post-dated cheques 'issued for question paper brokers'Six post-dated cheques which were suspected to have been issued in favour of mafia demanding over Rs 30 lakh from each candidate seeking alleged leaked question paper ahead of NEET held last month were recovered by Bihar Police.

Forest fires surge tenfold from 2004 to 2017: Causes, impact and preventionAmidst a relentless surge, intense forest fires are now multiplying tenfold, casting a menacing shadow over our flora and fauna. Year by year, their fiery grip tightens, threatening ecosystems far and wide, now extending their reach to impact human lives.

Fresh plea in Supreme Court to recall NEET results, reconduct examsA fresh petition has been filed in the Supreme Court to recall the National Entrance cum Eligibility Test - Under Graduate (NEET-UG) 2024 results and re-conduct fresh examination after discrepancies in the declared results.

NTA issues clarification after NEET result controversy over toppers, high cut-offIn a detailed statement, the National Testing Agency (NTA) said that the increase in cut-off and number of toppers in the NEET-UG reflect the competitive nature of the exam and maintained that the test's integrity has not been compromised.

Exclusive: Arvind Kejriwal claims 'BJP succession war, PM backing Amit Shah'Speaking exclusively to India Today TV, Delhi Chief Minister Arvind Kejriwal claimed that there is a "succession war" within the BJP. He also claimed that the ruling party is "not fighting the Lok Sabha elections as a team".

4 medical students arrested in Bihar for appearing as proxies for NEET aspirantsFour MBBS students who appeared in place of NEET aspirants in the medical entrance exam were detained in Bihar's Purnea.

NEET-UG question paper not leaked, claims baseless: National Testing AgencyThe reports claiming question paper leak in the medical entrance exam NEET-UG are "completely baseless and without any ground", the National Testing Agency (NTA) has clarified.
The generation with answers: Tech-savvy Indian youth tackling global challengesIndia's tech-savvy youth rewriting the global narrative, one solution at a time.

Left sweeps JNU students' polls, Dhananjay is first Dalit presidentThe Left swept the Jawaharlal Nehru University Students' Union (JNUSU) polls, winning all four posts and trouncing the RSS-affiliated ABVP. The ABVP was leading at one point, but the Left eventually surged ahead and emerged victorious.
The power of knowledge: Education's influence on real estate market trendsIn a dynamic sector like real estate, investing in continuing education is not simply an option; it is a requirement.

JNU students' body election on March 22 after 4 yearsThe Jawaharlal Nehru University Students' Union (JNUSU) polls will take place on March 22, more than four years after the last elections were held in September 2019.

UP 12th board exam math, biology papers leaked on WhatsApp, complaint filedThe mathematics and biology question papers for the Uttar Pradesh class 12 board exam were allegedly leaked on a WhatsApp group.

UP Police Constable recruitment exam cancelled days after paper leakThe Uttar Pradesh Police Constable recruitment exam held on February 17 and 18 was canceled due to a paper leak. The Chief Minister has announced a re-examination within the next six months.
